examples: The two business-promotion organisations set loose such acronymic beasts as HBI, CREED, TIF and CDBG.
The two business-promotion organisations set loose such acronymic beasts as HBI, CREED, TIF and CDBG .
I'm not sure what value all these acronymic systems have to the consumer if all they do is restore the RLX to merely passable luxury-sedan performance.
